tweet.text:
🚨How To Invest In SpaceX Before IPO??

2 Focussed ETFs are $XOVR $NASA 

1/ $NASA is a ‘core’ focussed Space ETF with key holdings in SpaceX and important Space companies including $RKLB $PL $LUNR and Filtronic PLC. 

2/ $XOVR : ERShares Private-Public Crossover ETF holds a significant position in SpaceX, though not direct ownership of shares. 
As of April 2026, the fund provides indirect, pre-IPO exposure to SpaceX, with reports indicating a ~10% to over 40% allocation at different points via special purpose vehicles (SPVs)

tweet.text:
Space theme - $RKLB $BKSY $LUNR $FLY

As I keep saying - don’t rely on a single metric to make decisions

Many assumed losing the 21 EMA meant the trend was over

What matters: are they holding VWAP? Are they respecting the daily/weekly trend?

$RKLB held VWAP from ATHs
$BKSY fakeout → held VWAP from recent lows
$LUNR $FLY showing similar behavior

Zoom out, identify the trend, size accordingly, and sit tight

Funny part - someone was upset a few days ago when space names pulled back… and try to say something about me and the post is deleted today 😂😂

and I agree space theme is not an easy names to hold - it's volatile and they are volatile for a reason!

tweet.text:
PORTFOLIO UPDATE 4/30
$IBKR   $LUNR   $QBTS   $ORCL   $TSLA   $XYZ   $MU   $CAVA   $CAVA   $ARM   $BE   $IBIT   $GEV   $VRT   $VRT   $CAT   $NBIS   $NBIS

What a day & week. Market reconfirmed the trend today, with a daily reversal on QQQE, and a hook-up above an already rising 10dma on MCSI. Breadth expending again, while Internals show a clean risk-on picture with Credit Spreads making a full downside reversal after rejecting the declining 21dma-structure. In short, everything says risk-on, from price, breadth, internals, LLs, and my PF feedback. 

I pressed a bit more today at the open after having de-risked QBTS, bringing my exposure just shy of 150% as per my gameplan if the market would re-confirm the trend. 

For now, it's a game of patience. The goal is to position along the pullback, accept the volatility that comes with it, and stay anchored to the structure. Once the market starts to confirm and momentum slowly comes back in, like today, the job shifts. It’s no longer about adding, it’s about managing. That means limiting new exposure, trimming into extensions and at predefined R multiples, and giving the market time to set up again. Let it digest, let the next leg build, then repeat the process. You’ll probably see me a bit less active, and that’s intentional. Staying disciplined in this phase matters more than doing more.

NER is still at 2.6%, but with a good 1.5% cushion on it. Open Heat back above 10%, while closed delta on the current market cycle is still growing at 7%. 

I'll share my April performance update tomorrow, but the highlight is that I'm back green YTD, with my 2nd-best month since 2020/21. We played that one well so far... but still so much work (and patience) to do to NOT fuck this up. It was a pleasure trading alongside you all this month 🙏👊

Cheers HAGN!

Today’s action:
NEW: IBKR
ADDED: 
TRIMMED: QBTS (1/3), CAT (1/5)
OUT:

tweet.text:
$ASTS $RKLB $LUNR $FLY

Uzaydan Doğrudan Telefon Bağlantısında Amazon Onaylı Yükseliş Dönemi

Uzaydan doğrudan akıllı telefonlara bağlantı sağlayan teknoloji artık bir hayal değil, trilyon dolarlık bir pazarın anahtarı haline geliyor. Amazon CEO’su Andy Jassy’nin tüketicilerin, şirketlerin ve hükümetlerin kesintisiz bağlantı konusunda "çok büyük" bir beklentisi olduğunu doğrulaması, sektörde taşları yerinden oynattı.

Bu dev onay sonrasında $ASTS, $RKLB ve $LUNR gibi Phone-to-Space odaklı hisseler gece seansında sert yükselişler kaydetti. Amazon’un bu pazardaki devasa talebi tescillemesi, uydu üzerinden mobil iletişim sağlayan şirketlerin sadece birer girişim değil, geleceğin telekomünikasyon standartları olduğunu kanıtlıyor.

Özellikle kapsama alanı dışındaki bölgelerde savunma, acil durum ve kurumsal veri akışı için bu teknolojiye duyulan ihtiyaç, şirketlerin değerlemelerinde yeni bir çarpan etkisi yaratıyor. Uzay ekonomisinde spekülatif dönemin yerini, Amazon gibi devlerin radarına giren somut talep verileri almaya başladı.

Kaynak: Stocktwits

quoted_tweet.text:
$RKLB +5.8% 🟢
Amazon’un Uydu İştahı Tedarikçileri Ateşledi

Herkes Amazon'un doğrudan cihaza (D2D) bağlantı için açıkladığı devasa talebi konuşuyor. Ancak piyasanın burada asıl fiyatladığı detay çok daha farklı.

Meselenin özü aslında şu ki, binlerce uyduluk LEO ağları yörüngeye kendi kendine oturmuyor. Amazon'un uzay pazarındaki bu boğa iştahı, fırlatma hizmetleri sunan Rocket Lab hisselerine anında değer kazandırdı.

Altına hücum döneminde asıl parayı kazma kürek satanlar kazanır. Uzay ekosistemi büyüdükçe, altyapı tedarikçileri yatırımcılar için en rasyonel fırsatı sunmaya devam edecek. 🚀

tweet.text:
Space Update After Big Day on Thursday
$ASTS $RDW $LUNR $RKLB 

$ASTS recently came down for a perfect touch of the broadening wedge bottom at $67.50, which is something I said to watch out for after the BB7 failure. Now it is fighting to regain the 200SMA and closed just above it yesterday. The next major resistance above is $81. Technically in a short-term downtrend, needs a few days of strong price action to reverse the trend. 

$RDW is also looking to reclaim the 200SMA here, after the recent pullback saw the Daily Stoch RSI reset fully to 0. The trend is only just holding here, so we need to see price push back to the key structural level of $9.75, which would see it reclaim the EMAs too. To the downside, $8.65 is the major support level. 

$LUNR remains in an uptrend and saw a recent pullback to the previous resistance trendline which I had been sharing since late 2025, before a perfect bounce. On Wednesday we saw a big hammer candle as price held the EMA20 during the pullback, and is back above the key structural level of $24.95. Thursday was a doji as investors decide if the pullback is over, or if there is a deeper retracement. Crucial end to the week. 

$RKLB also held the EMA20 during the recent pullback, just like $LUNR. However, it actually pulled back to the EMA50 for a perfect bounce, and then regained its key structural level ($78.50) yesterday with a lot more conviction. Looking for a higher close today and strong close to the week.
